name: visionpro-ar-module
description: Vision Pro AR 模块 - 基于WebXR的增强现实3D模型展示系统

scripts.cert:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const candidates=['cert/mkcert-cert.pem','cert/cert.pem'];const found=candidates.find(p=>fs.existsSync(p));if(found){console.log('✓ 证书存在');console.log('当前文件:',found);if(fs.existsSync('cert/rootCA.cer'))console.log('Vision Pro 安装文件: cert/rootCA.cer');}else{console.log('✗ 证书不存在，请运行: npm run cert');}"
